## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI/automation

## Validation

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make typecheck`
- [ ] `make docs`

If any step was skipped, explain why.

## Audio Quality Impact

- [ ] No audible behavior change expected
- [ ] Audible behavior changed (describe expected result and tradeoffs)

## Backward Compatibility

- [ ] Existing CLI flags/entrypoints remain compatible
- [ ] Breaking changes introduced (document migration steps)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Generated docs regenerated (if applicable)
- [ ] Risks and limitations documented
